title: Quality Cost Management Software Review: CostQC vs QualityCostPro - 2026 Review
description: Professional review of quality cost management software CostQC and QualityCostPro, analyzing prevention costs, appraisal costs, internal failure costs, ext
content:
Quality Cost Overview

Quality cost management is an important component of quality management. Through quality cost accounting and analysis, optimize quality management investment and reduce quality losses. CostQC and QualityCostPro are two professional quality cost management software, and this article will provide a comparative review.

Feature Comparison Overview

Feature ModuleCostQCQualityCostPro
Quality Cost AccountingComplete quality cost classification accountingBasic quality cost accounting
Prevention Cost ManagementDetailed prevention cost accounting and analysisPrevention cost recording
Appraisal Cost ManagementAppraisal cost accounting, inspection cost analysisAppraisal cost recording
Internal Failure CostInternal failure cost accounting, cause analysisInternal failure cost recording
External Failure CostExternal failure cost accounting, claims managementExternal failure cost recording
Cost Analysis ReportsMulti-dimensional cost analysis reportsBasic cost reports

Quality Cost Accounting Functions

CostQC provides complete quality cost classification accounting functions, according to quality cost standard classification (PAF model), including prevention costs, appraisal costs, internal failure costs, external failure costs four major categories.

Each cost category subdivides into multiple cost items, such as prevention costs including quality training, quality planning, process control, etc.; appraisal costs including inspection testing, quality auditing, supplier evaluation, etc.

QualityCostPro provides basic quality cost accounting functions, primarily quality cost recording and summarization. Cost classification is relatively simple, suitable for basic quality cost management needs.

Prevention Cost Management

CostQC provides detailed prevention cost accounting and analysis functions. Prevention costs include quality training costs, quality planning costs, process control costs, product design costs, etc.

System supports prevention cost accounting by department and project. Prevention cost investment effectiveness analysis, evaluating prevention cost investment returns.

QualityCostPro provides prevention cost recording functions, primarily prevention cost data recording. Prevention cost management functionality is relatively simple.

Appraisal Cost Management

CostQC provides appraisal cost accounting and analysis functions. Appraisal costs include inspection testing costs, quality auditing costs, supplier evaluation costs, measurement costs, etc.

System supports inspection cost accounting by process and product. Inspection cost efficiency analysis, evaluating inspection cost rationality.

QualityCostPro provides appraisal cost recording functions, primarily appraisal cost data recording. Appraisal cost analysis functionality is relatively simple.

Internal Failure Cost Management

CostQC provides internal failure cost accounting and cause analysis functions. Internal failure costs include scrap losses, rework repair losses, downtime losses, quality accident handling costs, etc.

System supports internal failure cost accounting by cause, process, product. Loss cause Pareto analysis, identifying main loss causes.

QualityCostPro provides internal failure cost recording functions, primarily internal failure cost data recording. Loss cost analysis functionality is relatively simple.

External Failure Cost Management

CostQC provides external failure cost accounting and claims management functions. External failure costs include claims losses, return losses, warranty expenses, price reduction losses, etc.

System supports external failure cost accounting by customer and product. Claims management includes claims registration, claims processing, claims tracking.

QualityCostPro provides external failure cost recording functions, primarily external failure cost data recording. Claims management functionality is relatively simple.

Quality Cost Analysis Reports

CostQC provides multi-dimensional quality cost analysis reports, including quality cost composition analysis, quality cost trend analysis, quality cost comparison analysis, quality cost effectiveness analysis, etc.

Report content is rich, including quality cost composition charts, trend charts, Pareto charts, etc. Supports quality cost target comparison analysis, evaluating quality cost control effectiveness.

QualityCostPro provides basic quality cost reports, primarily quality cost summary reports. Cost analysis report functionality is relatively simple.

Quality Cost Indicators

CostQC provides various quality cost indicator calculations, including quality cost rate (quality cost/sales revenue), prevention cost rate, appraisal cost rate, failure cost rate, etc.

Supports quality cost indicator trend analysis, evaluating quality cost control effectiveness. Quality cost indicator target management, setting target values and tracking achievement.

QualityCostPro provides basic quality cost indicator calculations, primarily quality cost rate and other basic indicators.

Data Collection Methods

CostQC supports multi-source data collection, able to collect quality cost data from financial systems, production systems, inspection systems, etc. System provides data interface, supporting automatic data collection.

Supports manual entry supplementation, ensuring quality cost data completeness and accuracy.

QualityCostPro primarily uses manual entry, with quality cost data manually entered into the system. Data collection methods are relatively single.

System Integration Capability

CostQC supports integration with ERP financial systems, MES production systems, inspection systems, etc., achieving automatic quality cost data collection. System provides standard API interfaces.

QualityCostPro provides basic integration capability, supporting data file import.

User Experience Comparison

CostQC features are complete, highly professional. System configuration is relatively complex, requiring certain quality cost knowledge and training. Suitable for enterprises with strict quality management requirements.

QualityCostPro is simple and easy to use, with simple operation processes. Suitable for enterprises with relatively simple quality cost management.

Price Comparison

VersionCostQCQualityCostPro
Basic100,000 CNY/year60,000 CNY/year
Standard180,000 CNY/year100,000 CNY/year
Advanced280,000 CNY/year150,000 CNY/year

Applicable Scenarios

CostQC suits: strict quality cost management requirements, detailed quality cost analysis needs, complete quality cost accounting requirements enterprises.

QualityCostPro suits: relatively basic quality cost management, limited budget, rapid deployment needs enterprises.

Selection Recommendations

Large manufacturing enterprises, strict quality management requirements, enterprises needing quality cost optimization analysis should choose CostQC.

SMEs, relatively basic quality cost management enterprises can choose QualityCostPro.

Summary

CostQC features are complete, highly professional, suitable for scenarios with strict quality cost management requirements; QualityCostPro is simple and easy to use, suitable for basic quality cost management needs. Selection should comprehensively consider enterprise quality cost management level and requirements.
author: Manufacturing Quality Expert
